title.en: The Lord of the Hanging Night Realm revealed.

content.en:
"Peacock Realm Lord, that multi-dimensional supreme thing is in the Xuanwu Star. "

The Lord of the Hanging Night Realm revealed.

"Xuanwu Xing, no wonder you can't take it away!" the Peacock Realm Lord smiled and said, "Let's go, let's go over now!"

Whew!!

The Night Hanging Night Realm Lord and the Peacock Realm Lord immediately escaped into the seventeenth dimensional void and headed for the Xuanwu Star.

......

In front of the basalt star.

The Peacock Realm Lord stared at the vine and immediately became extremely excited.

"Hahaha, it is indeed a multi-dimensional supreme thing, although it is not clear what the specific effect of this multi-dimensional supreme thing is, but any multi-dimensional supreme thing is incomparably precious, enough to improve my strength!" said the Peacock Realm Lord excitedly.

Just as he was about to make a move, his expression suddenly changed.

"Hahaha, Peacock Realm Lord, a multi-dimensional supreme thing, how can this kind of treasure be monopolized?"

As soon as the words fell, a figure emerged.

The Peacock Realm Lord stared at the comer, his brows furrowed slightly: "Silver Capital Realm Lord, why are you here!"

"Hahaha, Peacock Realm Lord, this is thanks to you, you and I are mortal enemies, I have been staring at the movements of your Peacock Xuanguo, you said that it is not a coincidence, the Lord of the Hanging Night Realm ran to find you, I sensed it, I was curious to take a look, and it turned out that you came to Xuanwu Star. "

"I'm lucky enough to come across this multidimensional supreme thing!"

The main road of the silver capital realm.

The Peacock Realm Lord knows that he can't defeat the Silver Capital Realm Lord with his own strength, this guy's attack is not very powerful, but his life-saving ability is too terrifying, and his defense is too perverted.

"Silver Capital Realm Lord, I don't want to fight with you today, but you actually found out, so we can divide a part of your multi-dimensional supreme thing, how about it?"

The Peacock Realm Lord didn't want to fight the Silver Capital Realm Lord and expose this place.

After all, the battle in the Ninth Realm, the movement is too big, and it will definitely be perceived by the other Ninth Realms, and this place will be exposed at that time.

If a large number of Ninth Realms were involved, he might not have the opportunity to obtain the multi-dimensional supreme thing.

Therefore, we can only share this multi-dimensional supreme thing with the Lord of the Silver Capital Realm!

"Okay.!"

The Silver Capital Realm Lord smiled.

"Strike together and pull out this multi-dimensional supreme thing. "

The Peacock Realm Lord proposed.

"Then let's do it!" said the Lord of the Silver Capital Realm.

Bang!!!

The two Ninth Realm made a move, their strength was much stronger than that of the Hanging Night Realm Lord, and they could get closer to the Xuanwu Star.

They continued to approach the Xuanwu Star, and the power of the Supreme Dimensional Rules protected them, and after a while, they were very close to the Xuanwu Star.

"Grab this vine in total!"

The Peacock Realm Lord said.

"Hmm!"

The Lord of the Silver Capital Realm responded.

Just when the Peacock Realm Lord restrained this vine and mobilized all his strength to try to drag it away, the Silver Capital Realm Lord did not deal with this vine, but hit the Peacock Realm Lord with one blow, and it was a full blow.

"Silver Capital Realm Lord, what are you doing???

The Peacock Realm Lord was shocked.

He never expected that Yindu would suddenly attack him under such circumstances, and he was completely defenseless.

Rumble!!!!

The Peacock Realm Lord was hit, and his body flew upside down into the Xuanwu Star.

If he really entered the Xuanwu Star, even with the strength of the Peacock Realm Lord, he would be torn apart and completely fall here.

"Hahaha, Peacock Realm Lord, I actually want to kill you the most, if you die, I can monopolize this multi-dimensional supreme thing!"

The Silver Capital Realm Lord said.

However.

The Peacock Realm Lord did not despair, just as he completely fell into the Xuanwu Star, his body suddenly froze, and then the dimension he was in began to distort.

"Peacock Realm Lord, I underestimated you, I didn't expect you to have such a treasure on your body, and you could rush out of the Xuanwu Star!"

The Silver Capital Realm Lord said in surprise.

At this moment, the Peacock Realm Lord was extremely angry, he almost died!

This time, he lost a life-saving object and was physically injured.

"Silver Capital Realm Lord, you are looking for death!"

The Peacock Realm Lord and the Silver Capital Realm Lord have been killed, and they don't care about this multi-dimensional supreme thing at all.

The Hanging Night Realm Lord in the distance was very remorseful, he knew that these two Ninth Realm One were fighting, and this place must have been exposed.

I had known that he wouldn't be looking for the Peacock Realm Master, maybe if he found another Ninth Realm to help, maybe it wouldn't cause other trouble.

At that time, he may be able to obtain half of the multidimensional supreme things.

But now, it's all over.

Thundered!!!!!

The Peacock Realm Lord and the Silver Capital Realm Lord fought wildly, the multi-dimensional mastery of various Nine Realms collided, and the various soul wills and masteries clashed, causing this area to continue to crumble.

Soon.

There was a soul will of the Ninth Realm who came across the dimension to spy on the situation here.

"The !!!! of the Multidimensional Supreme Thing"

That Ninth Realm was excited and immediately rushed over.

As time passed, more and more Ninth Realms came, but they didn't dare to snatch the multi-dimensional supreme thing, it was really their strength was limited, and they were not sure to take this multi-dimensional supreme thing.

Ten Pyloric Headquarters.

The Lord of the Covered Realm learned of the situation of the thirteenth dimensional Xuanwu Star, and immediately shuttled to the Xuanwu Star of the seventeenth dimension.

"A multi-dimensional supreme thing, a good thing!"

The Lord of the Covered Realm was very interested in this multi-dimensional supreme thing, but he had seen a lot of the Ninth Realm, especially the strength of the Peacock Realm Lord, who was not weaker than him!

If he wanted to take this multi-dimensional supreme thing from so many Ninth Realms, it would definitely not be easy.

Over time.

The situation here is gradually leaking out.

In addition, the battle in the ninth realm spread too widely, Ye Tian naturally also noticed the fluctuations, and he was also curious about what was going on over there, so he immediately went over to take a look. (Good Lee Hao)

As an existence of the eighth realm, although Ye Tian did not raise his soul will to the seventeenth dimension, he could also enter the seventeenth dimension.

As long as there are too many multi-dimensional stars from the sixteenth dimension to the eighteenth dimension, the power of the multi-dimensional stars affects each other, making the dimensional barrier between these dimensions very weak, so as long as you can enter the sixteenth dimension, you can enter the seventeenth dimension.

Wow!

Ye Tian entered the seventeenth dimension and soon came to Xuanwu's side.

When he entered here, he was really shocked by the number of Ninth Realms here.

"So many Ninth Realms!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

He also found that some of the eyes of the Ninth Realm were looking at him, but these Ninth Realms found that he was only a mid-eighth realm cultivator, so they ignored him.

After all, when such an eighth realm comes here, don't even want to participate in the battle, otherwise it's just looking for death, and there's no need to care.
